name: mcp-skills
description: Local skill pack that documents when to use each managed MCP service and its tools.

interface.shortDescription: Skill routing notes for local MCP services.
interface.longDescription: A personal local plugin that wraps selected managed non-excluded MCP services as Codex skills. Each skill explains when to use that MCP server, which tools it exposes, and when each tool is the right fit.
defaultPrompt: Use the right MCP skill for this task.
Show me which MCP tool fits this request.
Audit my MCP tool routing for this workflow.
